rulings.Case Title: NICHOLAS PANOUTSOPOULOS et al VS. THE KARSANT FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP et al

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 23, 2015, Line 1. DEFENDANT ANDREW ZACKS, ZACKS & FREEDMAN, P.C. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs is GRANTED. Defendants shall recover $16,660 in attorneys' fee and $1,020 in costs. No opposition filed. =(501/RAW)

rulings.Case Title: VLADISLAV CHERNOGUZ VS. YOLANDA CACH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 23, 2015, Line 8. PLAINTIFF VLADISLAV CHERNOGUZ MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Summary Judgment is DENIED.
